aeo_readiness.summary: While Torrance Comfort Systems has a strong local presence, AI assistants are unlikely to cite them due to a lack of structured conversational content and authority signals.

Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation processes.

critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage with local audience.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Torrance Comfort Systems is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to cite and recommend services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to maintain market leadership.
